narrative:
Precinct Goshen 1/Roswell (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 732 registered voters, with 57.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.9%, a modest Republican lean of 2.3 percentage points.
